untranslatable_reason: Signal requires bid-ask spread measurement (not in allowed indicators) and liquidity absorption capacity analysis (market depth/slippage testing not directly available). Volume and volatility proxies used as substitutes, but the full liquidity filtering logic cannot be precisely replicated with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'ADV exceeds 100,000' as volume > 100000. Bid-ask spread requirement cannot be directly expressed. Used hvol_20 < 0.02 (2% volatility) as inverse proxy for tight spread environment. Market absorption capacity (50% ADV without 2% slippage) requires order book depth data unavailable in indicator set. Stop-loss trigger set to volume < 25000 matching intraday liquidity drop condition.
